title: Anduril and Archer unveiled an autonomous attack rotorcraft built on air taxi technology. First flight is planned for 2027.
summary: Anduril and Archer unveiled Thunder at Farnborough, an autonomous attack VTOL built on a dual-use air taxi platform. Archer has already completed multiple test flights with full-scale surrogate aircraft.
caption: output/2026-07-20/anduril-and-archer-unveiled-an-autonomous-attack-rotorcraft-built-on-a.txt
